headline: Royal Caribbean Expands Into River Cruises And Private Destinations For Growth
summary: Royal Caribbean (NYSE:RCL) has announced a major push into river cruising with the launch of Celebrity River Cruises. The company plans a significant increase in private destination locations by 2028 as part of a broader destination-focused strategy. Management also introduced a new guest experience program built around four experiential categories centered on culture, technology, and tailored adventures. For you as an investor, this marks a meaningful broadening of NYSE:RCL's cruise...
